description: secretx-aws-sm/src/lib.rs uses format!("{svc}") in map_get_error and map_put_error (~lines 107, 113, 133, 143). secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs uses format!("{svc}") in sign() and public_key_der() (~lines 249, 254, 298, 303). A single-argument format string that only calls Display is equivalent to .to_string() but incurs an extra allocation and trips clippy::useless_format. These should be svc.to_string() (or use the Display value directly where possible).
title: useless format!("{x}") should be .to_string() in aws-sm and aws-kms
